title: nepeta longiflora
intro: Nepeta longiflora, also known as long-flowered catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the digestive system and soothe inflammation. The health benefits of Nepeta longiflora include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Nepeta longiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and well-being.
